title: Single-cell integration handoff spec
context: A handoff spec defining how bulk reanalysis outputs feed a separate single-cell integration project (ewing-single-cell-atlas), keeping scope boundaries explicit (PLAN backlog/M4). Binding guardrails: open-access / aggregate / de-identified data only; controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA/biobanks) and identifiable patient data are out of scope; COSMIC/OncoKB/MSigDB-restricted are recipe-reference only; no clinical/diagnostic/prognostic/treatment language; research-only, not medical advice; provenance on every assertion.
objective: Specify the single-cell integration handoff: interfaces, data formats, provenance contracts and scope boundaries between this project and ewing-single-cell-atlas.
acceptanceCriteria: Handoff spec defines data formats, metadata/provenance contracts and versioning for the single-cell project.
Scope boundaries are explicit (what this project does and does not provide).
Spec preserves license/consent constraints across the handoff.
